summary: Fix the mobile project editor backdrop layering and add write-only operational usage events without affecting user workflows.

notes: Stores only department-owner login and app-center open events required for delivery operations.
Authenticated application users can insert validated events but cannot select, update, or delete usage logs.
Actor and application labels are bound to server-side employee and app-center records, and metadata is restricted to the expected minimum fields.
Keeps the mobile project configuration editor above its blur backdrop and assigns its portaled selects to the modal layer.
Adds dialog semantics to the mobile project editor.
Records operational usage events silently; failures never render a message or block navigation.
Defers the one-time login event until normal application bootstrap completes so telemetry cannot delay login.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.19.0.
Run scripts/assert-usage-event-log-access.sql against production after migration 141.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.19.0.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.19.0.
